Agent Cody Banks 2: Destination London (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $23,514,247Details
International Box Office $5,188,836
Worldwide Box Office $28,703,083
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$8,014,005 (34.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.93 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:81.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$26,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,973 opening theaters/2,973 max. theaters, 3.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $45,286,695

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 12th, 2004 (Wide) by MGM
International Releases: March 18th, 2004 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: July 13th, 2004 by MGM Video
MPA Rating: PG for action violence and some crude humor
Running Time: 100 minutes
Franchise: Agent Cody Banks

Subgenre: Family Adventure

Production Method:Live Action

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
